2026-06-18TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the St. John’s Port AuthorityAppointment of Mark G. Duggan of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, to be a director of the St. John’s Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Beth Maureen McGrath, whose term has expired.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the St. John’s Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Mark G. Duggan of St. John’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, to be a director of the St. John’s Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years, in the place of Beth Maureen McGrath, whose term has expired.
